name: fullstack-app
description: React + TypeScript + Tailwind + Motion frontend, NestJS + PostgreSQL (Prisma) backend.

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run start:dev --prefix backend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix backend
